§6Abandoned Mineshafts Overhauled§f

§aThis mod completely revamps vanilla abandoned mineshafts into dynamic, varied webs of tunnels!§f
The §9Abandoned Mineshafts Overhauled§f mod replaces the standard straight-line mineshafts with sprawling, organic underground networks full of rare finds and unique structures.

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Dynamic Tunnels§f: Sprawling, organic webs of shafts with §e13 distinct biome variants§f, including a rare §5mushroom mineshaft§f.
§b• Abandoned Workstations§f: Common workspaces where you can find loot tucked away in corners.
§b• Workstation Cellars§f: Less common underground cellars containing hidden gear.
§b• Miners' Outposts§f: Rare outposts featuring beds and chests left behind by previous miners.
§b• Surface Openings§f: Very rare entrances that open directly onto the surface.
§b• Ore Deposits§f: Large deposits located at the end of some tunnels containing coal, iron, redstone, gold, lapis, emerald, and (very rarely) diamond.

§cWarning§f: These massive underground webs make it incredibly easy to get lost. Always mark your path and keep your §9weapons§f ready for subterranean threats.
